scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/daemon && bun build src/index.ts --target=bun --outfile=dist/index.js && bun build src/daemon/index.ts --target=bun --outfile=dist/daemon/index.js
scripts.build:dev: sed -i '' 's/"@routstr\/sdk": "\^0.2.11"/"@routstr\/sdk": "file:..\/routstr-chat\/sdk"/' package.json && bun install && bun run build && sed -i '' 's/"@routstr\/sdk": "file:..\/routstr-chat\/sdk"/"@routstr\/sdk": "^0.2.11"/' package.json && bun install
